violations.text: Gaskets for the 4 door stack reach-in cooler were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath sinks, fanguards, walls and ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Pooled water observed in the kitchen area and ware-washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
Food prep sink was observed to be draining slowly and/or leaking from drain and in poor repair. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into the pre-rinse basin of the dishwashing area. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The floor and wall junctures underneath the prep sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Floor tiles on the cook line and in the ware washing area were observed to be missing and or cracked and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The ceiling above and around dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2025

The floors in upstairs storage area and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The hand-washing sink in the service area was blocked by sanitizer bucket within the sink. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (blueberries and other pancake toppings) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the service prep unit and the light cover within the dairy walk-in cooler, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned at a frequency that prevents the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath sinks and ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Pooled water observed in the kitchen area and ware-washing area. Floors shall be mopped. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Various sinks throughout the establishment were observed to be draining slowly or leaking from drain and in poor repair (prep sink, 3-bay sink, and dishwashing hand sink). Sinks and other plumbing fixtures must be repaired and maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into the pre-rinse basin of the dishwashing area. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The floor and wall junctures underneath the prep sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Floor tiles on the cook line and in the ware washing area were observed to be missing and or cracked and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025
Pooled water observed on the kitchen floor. Establishment shall clean and mop any pooled water observed on the floors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets at the prep station and 4 door refrigerator observed in poor repair. -Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 08/04/23. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath/behind all kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 10/31/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The floors/walls in the kitchen prep area, ware-washing area, and floors in the walk-in cooler area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Floors/walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 10/31/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The prep station was observed held at 47-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff voluntarily disposed of TCS foods above 41 degrees F. during this inspection. -Service was contacted. Establishment shall not store TCS foods in the prep station until it is able to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees F. or below. *Thermometers checked at 32F. during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets in the prep station and 4 door refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath sinks and ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Pooled water observed in the kitchen area and ware-washing area. Floors shall be mopped. -The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
Grease trap must be maintained and properly removed to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The floors in the kitchen area, ware-washing area, and floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
